description_long: This is a large, multi-building residential house complex with red brick facades and gray, multi-hipped roofs. The complex is arranged in a U-shape, with a central main building flanked by two smaller wings on each side, creating a semi-enclosed courtyard. The buildings feature numerous rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows, and several bay window extensions are visible. Mature green trees are interspersed between the buildings, adding a landscaped touch to the property. The main entryway is prominent, with a covered porch and steps leading up to the central building. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and suburban architectural influences, with a focus on symmetry and communal outdoor space.
description: A large, red-brick, multi-building house complex with gray hipped roofs, symmetrical window rows, and a central entryway, arranged in a U-shape with landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main central building, flanked by two symmetrical wings and two trees in the courtyard.
description_view_1: Side angle revealing the depth of the central building, the side wings, and the arrangement of trees between the structures.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back facades of the wings and the central building, with visible bay windows and trees.
description_view_3: Oblique view showing the side and partial front of the complex, emphasizing the bay windows and the main entry porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with steps, prominent main door, and decorative columns
